parameters.message: =Confirmed! {{ $env.COMPANY_NAME }} appointment booked for {{ $('Transform to Speakable Slots').item.json.slotsOffered[0].displayTime }}. A technician will arrive in a fully-stocked truck. Reply HELP for assistance or STOP to opt out.

=Hi {{ $json.customerData.firstName }}, we're currently experiencing high demand and are fully booked for the next 48 hours. A manager from {{ $env.COMPANY_NAME }} will call you back within 10 minutes to find a solution. We appreciate your patience!

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "action": "speak_and_end",
  "message": "I apologize, but we're fully booked for the next 48 hours due to high demand. I've just sent you a text confirmation, and one of our managers will personally call you back within 10 minutes to find a solution for you. We really appreciate your patience. Is there anything else I should note for the manager?",
  "status": "no_availability",
  "callback_promised": true,
  "callback_deadline_minutes": 10,
  "customer_id": "{{ $json.customerData.customerId }}"
}
